  • Class
    Description
    BasicJdbcMechanism
    Internal Class used to initiate a database call by setting the bind variables.
    DAOProxy
    DAO proxy class.
    EntityTransactionImpl
    Concrete class to represent a transaction.
    FactoryStore
    Store to hold the actiev EntityManagerFactory.
    JdbcException
    The JPA-LiTE framework will throw JdbcException if the query execution fails.
    JdbcReader
    JDBC Reader object.
    JdbcWriter
    JDBC writer class.
    LiteEntityManager
    Native Entity Manager to interact with the persistence context.
    LiteEntityManagerFactory
    JPA LiTE entity manager factory.
    LiteEntityManagerImpl
    Concrete class to represent a LiTE entity manager.
    LitePersistenceProvider
    Persistence provider for LiTE jpa framework.
    ModelProcessor
    Model Processor class.
    PersistenceHolder
    Holder class to keep the metadata details.
    PersistenceUnitCache
    Cache to store the PersistenceUnitInfo.
    PersistenceUnitCacheImpl
    Concrete class that represents a cache.
    PersistenceUnitInfoImpl
    Platform provided persistence unit info.
    PersistenceVerifier
    This verifier class verifies the database properties in the persistence config file.
    Query
    Base interface to represent a query executor.
    QueryMechanism
    The query mechanism interface.
    UnitOfWork
    Indicates a unit of work to be performed.
    Work
    Indicates a work that an EntityManager is performing.
